prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on water (H₂O) at DFT, tier 'standard' → B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied water.xyz, used as a single point (not re-relaxed at this level). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy: true (all checks passed).

Results:
  HOMO energy:       −8.6037183 eV
  LUMO energy:       +0.33695037 eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap:      8.9406687 eV  ← headline value

All orbital energies are Koopmans-style single-particle quantities, not excitation energies. No experimental comparison is offered.
